docket_entries.description: AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED DEC-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTLEY, BRIAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GIARDINA, LAWRENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNTLEY, BRIAN $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,315.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY GIARDINA, LAWRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTLEY, BRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTLEY, BRIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED DEC-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTLEY, BRIAN
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/05/19/ PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE GIARDINA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIAN HUNTLEY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
